mechanics.excerpt: Ian Cameron, who became director gen: eral in 2549, expanded the Hegemony'$ peacemaking role and negotiated an end t0 number of conflicts In 2556 Ian per- suaded the leaders of the Free Worlds League ad the Capellan Confederation t0 sign the Treaty of Geneva; this famous docu- ment Iaid the groundwork for the formation of the Star League_ the interstellar alliance that all too briefly ended wars and advanced the general welfare humanity The Lyran Commonwealth signed the treaty in 2558; the Federated Suns_ 2567 With the inclusion of the Draconis Combine in 2569 Ian Cameron achieved his dream uniting vir tually all humanity under one leader: Led by the enlightened Cameron dynasty, the Star League gave its citizens peace and prosperity for nearly two hundred years.
